name: Triple Barrels!
description: Triple Barrels! is a Bandit style shotgun with a triple barrel setup that spends 3 ammo per shot. Expect the usual Bandit trade-offs: slower fire rate and heavier recoil, offset by higher damage and a larger magazine. It can burn through ammunition quickly, so it suits players who can afford the extra ammo cost.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
